title: Employee can check in with webcam photo
description: Verifies an authenticated employee can capture a webcam photo, submit a check-in, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the attendance check-in/out page
Wait for the camera preview to be available
Capture a photo using the web camera
Select check-in
Submit attendance
Verify a successful check-in confirmation is visible

title: Daily attendance check-in succeeds after webcam capture
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the attendance page, capture a photo via webcam, check in, and see a successful confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the attendance check-in/out page
Wait for the webcam preview or camera-ready state to be displayed
Capture a photo using the webcam capture control
Submit a check-in
Verify a check-in success confirmation is visible

title: Employee can sign in and reach authenticated landing
description: Verifies an employee can log in with valid credentials and is taken to an authenticated post-login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user is authenticated and sees a signed-in landing page state

title: Employee onboarding completes registration and profile update
description: Verifies a new employee can register, land in the authenticated area, update profile details, and save successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a valid name into the name field
Fill a unique valid email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same valid password into the password confirmation field
Submit the registration form
Click the navigation link to the profile page
Fill an updated value into a profile field that is editable
Save profile changes
Verify a save success confirmation is visible

title: Employee can check out after checking in
description: Verifies an authenticated employee can check in and later check out with webcam capture and see a success confirmation for check-out.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the attendance check-in/out page
Wait for the camera preview to be available
Capture a photo using the web camera
Select check-in
Submit attendance
Wait for the check-in submission to complete
Capture a new photo using the web camera
Select check-out
Submit attendance
Verify a successful check-out confirmation is visible

title: Daily attendance check-out succeeds after check-in
description: Verifies an authenticated user can check in with a captured photo and later complete check-out, ending with a visible check-out confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the attendance check-in/out page
Wait for the webcam preview or camera-ready state to be displayed
Capture a photo using the webcam capture control
Submit a check-in
Capture a new photo using the webcam capture control
Submit a check-out
Verify a check-out success confirmation is visible

title: New employee can register and land in logged-in state
description: Verifies a new user can register a new account and is automatically logged in or taken to a logged-in landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the name field with Test Employee
Fill in the email field with a newly generated unique email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is in an authenticated logged-in state

title: Unauthenticated user is gated from protected attendance page
description: Verifies a logged-out user cannot access the attendance check-in/out page and is redirected to authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /attendance/check-in-out
Verify the user is prompted to authenticate before accessing protected content

title: Unauthenticated user is gated from protected admin dashboard
description: Verifies a logged-out user cannot access the admin dashboard and is redirected to authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user is prompted to authenticate before accessing protected content

title: Employee submits a leave request and sees it in the list after refresh
description: Verifies an authenticated employee can create a leave request with required dates and reason, see it listed, and still see it after a refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the leave page
Select a valid start date in the leave start date field
Select a valid end date in the leave end date field
Fill a specific reason into the leave reason field
Submit the leave request
Press F5
Verify a leave request entry with the specific reason is displayed in the leave list

title: Profile updates persist after refresh
description: Verifies an authenticated user can change an editable profile field, save, refresh, and still see the updated value present.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the profile page
Fill a new identifiable value into an editable profile field
Save profile changes
Press F5
Verify the profile page shows the updated identifiable value

title: Non-admin is denied access to admin dashboard
description: Verifies a non-admin user cannot access the admin dashboard and is shown an access denied or insufficient permissions state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify an access denied or insufficient permissions message is visible

title: Signed-in employee can update profile details
description: Verifies an authenticated employee can edit profile fields and the changes save successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the user profile page
Fill in the name field with Test Employee Updated
Submit the profile changes
Verify a profile update success confirmation is visible

title: Admin dashboard renders KPIs, 7-day trend, and recent leaves
description: Verifies an admin can access the dashboard and see KPI summaries, a 7-day attendance trend visualization, and a recent leave requests list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the admin dashboard
Verify KPI summary cards are displayed
Verify a 7-day attendance trend visualization and a recent leave requests list are displayed

title: Monthly attendance report renders summary and details for a selected month
description: Verifies an authenticated user can select a month/period on the reports page and see both a report summary and detail rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the reports page
Select a valid month or reporting period
Verify a monthly attendance report summary is displayed
Verify attendance detail rows are displayed

title: Switching report months updates displayed report data
description: Verifies changing the selected month/period updates the monthly report content shown on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the reports page
Select a valid month or reporting period
Select a different valid month or reporting period
Verify the report summary and details update to reflect the newly selected period

title: Attendance submission requires captured photo
description: Verifies the attendance form prevents submission when no photo is captured and shows a photo-required validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the attendance check-in/out page
Select check-in
Submit attendance
Verify a validation error is visible indicating a photo is required

title: Attendance submission is blocked without a captured photo
description: Verifies the attendance page prevents check-in/out submission when no photo has been captured and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the attendance check-in/out page
Submit a check-in without capturing a photo
Verify a photo-required validation error is visible

title: Profile password change blocks mismatched confirmation
description: Verifies the profile form prevents saving when the new password and confirmation do not match and shows a mismatch validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the user profile page
Fill a valid value into the new password field
Fill a different valid value into the confirm password field
Submit the profile changes
Verify a password mismatch validation error is visible

title: Profile password mismatch shows validation error
description: Verifies the profile password change prevents saving when the new password and confirmation do not match and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the profile page
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill a different valid password into the password confirmation field
Submit the password change
Verify a password mismatch validation error is visible

title: Registration requires password
description: Verifies the registration form blocks account creation when the password is missing and shows a required-field validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the name field with Test Employee
Fill in the email field with a newly generated unique email
Fill in the password field with an empty value
Submit the registration form
Verify a password required validation error is visible

title: Leave request requires dates
description: Verifies the leave request form blocks submission when required date fields are empty and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the leave page
Fill a reason into the leave reason field
Submit the leave request
Verify a required-date validation error is visible
